steps.title: Make each singular and past
steps.content: The subject is Each of these republics. Because Each is singular, the verb must be singular; because the sentence describes a Soviet-era historical fact, it must also be past tense.

steps.title: Reject number and tense errors
steps.content: Choice A is plural and present perfect. Choice B is plural and present tense. Choice D is past tense but plural, so it still fails to agree with Each. The answer is C.
